message:
chore: compact integration test suites, apply rustfmt, and add coverage tests

Condense benchmark_coverage_saturation and transfer_governance
integration test files by merging granular single-assertion tests into
combined multi-assertion tests, removing redundant section separators
and verbose comments (~1100 lines net reduction).

Apply rustfmt to hardware_board_claim_gate and
metadata_locality_governance_gate source files (long line breaks,
assert macro formatting, function signature alignment). Remove unused
ContentHash imports from 4 integration test files (adversarial
supremacy, controller composition, regexp string, resource certificate).

Add new integration tests:
- unload_extension_clears_session_record
- evaluator_reject_records_live_binding_cell_died_event
- evaluate_all_surfaces_records_ledger_once
- .clone() fixes for ContentHash in hardware_board_claim tests

Update beads issue tracker timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
